Essay

Eimi is free to read. If this essay was of use to you, consider supporting the research program.

Acquisition

Acquire
Acquire
Delivery
Pre-launch preview. No payment is captured. After confirming, the work enters your queue as pending payment. Settlement — Stripe or crypto — activates on 20 May 2026.
Note
Editor's
Note

The object holds something. Our work is to describe what, and how.

Eimi is a research-driven art dealership organized around a single scholarly argument: that certain objects exceed their surface, and pass something real to the viewer. We call this presence. We treat it as a problem for criticism, not a mystery.

Every essay begins with an object. Every object receives the weight of a full reading — material, provenance, theoretical context — before it is priced, before it is placed, before it is ours to speak for.

The traditions we engage are evidence for the argument, not its subject. A Byzantine textile, a Moche vessel, a Hofmann canvas, a Shaker chair, an Ife terracotta — these works are not related by period or geography. Each does the same thing, in different material, for different reasons. Eimi follows presence wherever it leads.

Founded2026 PublicationWeekly PaymentCrypto-native MethodScience of the Object

Method
Statement
of Method

The object holds something. Our work is to describe what, and how.

Eimi is organized around a single scholarly argument: that certain objects exceed their surface, and pass something real to the viewer. We call this presence. We treat it as a problem for criticism, not a mystery.

Every essay begins with an object. Every object receives the weight of a full reading — material, provenance, theoretical context — before it is priced, before it is placed, before it is ours to speak for.

The traditions we engage are evidence for the argument, not its subject. A Byzantine textile, a Moche vessel, a Hofmann canvas, a Shaker chair, an Ife terracotta — these works are not related by period or geography. Each does the same thing, in different material, for different reasons. Eimi follows presence wherever it leads.

Founded2026 PublicationWeekly PaymentCrypto-native MethodScience of the Object
Records · Institutional ledgers

The institution's records, consolidated. Six ledgers across object, scholarly, and personnel domains. Each ledger is a staff and institutional surface — the operational record from which the public-facing institution is composed.

    Support Eimi

    Reading is free. Participation is not.

    All essays, research, and writer archives are open. A monthly tier funds the research program and grants access to Eimi's working desk — direct correspondence with writers, tracked acquisitions, and the internal workspaces. A one-time gift is equally welcome.
